title: work-items.yaml — per-project ALM traceability source
description: One file per project, partitioned by agent then by feature. Single source of truth for the local-to-ALM mapping. See design/08-traceability.md.

featureTraceability.description: Per-feature traceability — items grouped by L1-L4 hierarchy level. The level names are project-configurable in project.config.yaml alm.hierarchy.

uid.description: Stable local identifier (e.g., 'ce-cm-L1-01'). Never changes once assigned. Letters case-preserving.

parent.description: uid of the parent work item (next-higher L). Empty for L1.

alm-type.description: Maps to one of project.config.yaml alm.hierarchy values (e.g., 'Epic', 'Feature', 'User Story', 'Task').

alm-id.description: ID returned by ADO or JIRA after /alm push. Empty before first push.

section-refs.description: Stable section IDs from spec/plan/TDD that this work item realises (e.g., 'FR-01', 'TS-03', 'TC-07').

task-card.description: Relative path to tasks/NN-{slug}.md when alm-type is the lowest hierarchy level

output-path.description: Relative path to the produced code/artefact folder

syncHash.description: Content hash at last sync; used by /alm push fail-on-conflict strategy
